passives.name: Awe
passives.effects: Grants {{as|'''bonus''' attack damage}} equal to {{as|2% '''maximum''' mana}}.

passives.name: Shock
passives.effects: Basic attacks [[on-hit]] against champions deal {{as|{{as|{{fd|1.2}}% '''maximum''' mana}} '''bonus''' physical damage}}. Dealing ability damage to champions with a champion ability deals {{as|{{as|{{fd|{{fd|4}}/{{fd|3}}}}% '''maximum''' mana}} '''bonus''' physical damage}} unless the damage also counts as proc damage. Both triggers can only be activated on the same target once every {{fd|6.5}} seconds from the same {{tip|cast instance}}.

effects_structured.raw: Gain bonus attack damage equal to 2% of maximum mana.
On-hit basic attacks against champions deal bonus physical damage equal to 1.2% of maximum mana (per-target cooldown).

Champion abilities that deal damage to champions deal bonus physical damage equal to 4% (melee) / 3% (ranged) maximum mana; proc-damage abilities are excluded; same-target trigger is limited once every 6.5s per cast instance.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Shop sell value was corrected to Tier-1 canonical dataset/page values during Tear-line sibling review.

Execution model: Shock has two champion-only damage branches, one on basic-attack hit (1.2% max mana) and one on champion-ability damage (4% melee / 3% ranged max mana, excluding proc-damage branches).
Timing model: both Shock branches are constrained by same-target 6.5-second cast-instance gating rather than unrestricted per-hit spam.
